name: AAC TECHNOLOG.HLDG.DL-,01
summary: AAC Technologies Holdings Inc. designs, develops, and manufactures a broad range of acoustic components, haptic technology, precision metal components, optics, and micro electro-mechanical systems (MEMS) components. These components are used in mobile devices, smartphones, wearables, consumer electronics, and automotive applications. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
